author: Sangharakshita
title: Contents of Pali Canon - Meghiya Sutta
content:
"Meghiya" Sutta Seminar (Unedited)

Introduction
Communication
The Mango Grove and Meghiya's needs
Walking meditation
Meghiya's request and the Buddha's reply
The Importance of the Buddha's attendant
A sense of one self-worth
Meghiya's second request and the Buddha's reply
Meghiya questioning the Buddha's awareness
Meghiya's over literal approach
Unskilful states in the Mango Grove
The Buddha's levels of concentration
Levels of consciousness and postures of the Buddhas and Bodhisattvas
Washing the slate clean
Puja, emotional, creative and archetypal
The Immature Heart and five things that conduce to its maturity
1) Spiritual Friendship
II) A monk is virtuous, ethical
III) Discussion
IV) Resolute in energy, meditation
Continuous mantra recitation
V) Insight
Everything follows from spiritual friendship
The importance of Right Effort
Asubha Bhavana
History of Udana
"Thoughts trite and subtle..."
Dangerous states of elation
Bhante's adventures at Yale
General points on the Meghiya Sutta
Ananda's memory.
